valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Mon 16 Mar 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 17 Mar 2026
general_synopsis: Low 150 miles south of Iceland 966 moving steadily northeast losing its identity by 1800 Monday. New low expected 200 miles south of Iceland 960 by same time. New high expected France 1024 by that time
